title: RYSONS Window Insulation Kit Fit Double Glazing Shrink Film Draught Excluder Condensation
features: Easy to install: The kit comes with everything needed, including the insulation, tape, and instructions. Install it yourself in just a few minutes.
The insulation film blocks out cold air in the winter and hot air in the summer.
The kit can help save money on the energy bills.
The insulation film is see-through, so you can still enjoy the view from the windows.
description: Product Description Rysons Window Insulation Kit is a DIY solution that lets create an extra layer of insulation on the windows. It consists of a clear plastic film and a double-sided tape that can easily apply to any window frame. The Rysons Window Insulation Kit is a DIY solution that lets create an extra layer of insulation on the windows. It consists of a clear plastic film and a double-sided tape that can easily apply to any window frame. Window Insulation Kit has many benefits for the home and the environment. According to some sources, window insulation kits can: Cut down the costs of heating by 30-40% . Reduce heat loss and regulate the surface temperature of the interior glass. Make your home more comfortable and energy-efficient . Protect your windows from condensation and moisture damage. Block harmful UV rays and noise pollution. The Rysons Window Insulation Kit is a smart and affordable way to improve the home’s insulation and comfort. Energy-efficient: Protect the windows from condensation and moisture damage. Reduce heat loss and regulate the surface temperature of the interior glass. Included: Shrink film: 1.57m x 1.82m, Adhesive tape: 12.7mm x 10.1m Insulates 2 windows size: 1m x 1.5m (approx.) Easy to install: It consists of a clear plastic film and a double-sided tape that can easily apply to any window frame. The film shrinks when heated with a hairdryer, creating a tight seal that prevents cold air from entering and warm air from escaping. See-through: The film is transparent and does not reduce the amount of light or visibility through the window. It is suitable for all types of windows, including painted, varnished, wooden, aluminium, PVC, uPVC, and vinyl frames. Easy to apply Easy to apply in 3 simple steps
